full_name: Wrought aluminium alloy EN AW-6061 [AlMg1SiCu], material number 3.3211
version_year: Designation per EN 573-3; properties per EN 485 / EN 755 product standards
scope: Medium-strength heat-treatable wrought Al-Mg-Si alloy strengthened by Mg2Si precipitation. Good weldability and atmospheric/seawater corrosion resistance; used in architecture, automotive, railway and structural extrusions. Data below for T6 temper.
license_note: composition/property data widely republished by independent free sources, not the copyrighted EN document text
